fields.acceptance_criteria: Ratatui operator panel shows session list + live stream + mode controls; async websocket updates handled on a dedicated event loop without UI stall; minimal controls (start/toggle-loop/pause/resume/stop/inspect) operate against a running agent-server.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH7] Ratatui minimal operator interface
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check -p agent-tui. Primary: cargo test -p agent-tui (control->command mapping, async stream handling against mocked server). Manual: TUI smoke run vs local server, record terminal size. Failure logs: target/test-logs/.
